top_signals.title: SecondFi maps recovery path after $2.4 million Cardano wallet exploit, aims to return funds within two weeks
top_signals.summary: An exploit drained about $2.4 million in ADA from 374 addresses over three days through a flaw in SecondFi's wallet-generation software.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: In Kyushu’s far south, Senti.U sparks a culinary destination
top_signals.summary: Drawn by the quality of Kanoya's local produce, chef Yasuhiko Uchida relocated to the Osumi Peninsula. Now, his restaurant is a shining example of Kagoshima's culinary appeal.
